title: FIFA prez: People should 'chill' over WC visa issu...
summary: FIFA president Gianni Infantino stated that FIFA cannot dictate to the U.S. government regarding World Cup visitor entry decisions. Infantino emphasized the need to "chill and relax" over visa concerns, suggesting flexibility on potential barriers to entry.
content: FIFA president Gianni Infantino said the organization cannot dictate to the U.S. government who to allow into its country for the World Cup, saying that sometimes it is better to "chill and relax" over visa issues.
